title: Croatian Rigatoni Pasta Bake
description: A hearty, comforting pasta bake infused with the flavors of Croatia. Perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Cook the rigatoni pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, combine the pasta sauce, garlic powder, and dried oregano. Bring to a simmer and let cook for 2-3 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked rigatoni pasta, pasta sauce mixture, and chopped parsley. Mix well to combine.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with grated mozzarella and parmesan cheese.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 20-25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let rest for a few minutes before serving.
